programme.desc: It's FA Cup 5th round day in February 1972 and Brian Moore introduces highlights of Everton against Tottenham Hotspur at Goodison Park. Plus, Birmingham City, with their exciting strike partnership of Trevor Francis and Bob Latchford, go up against Portsmouth and Huddersfield Town enjoy a memorable win over West Ham. With analysis by Jimmy Hill.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Another case of the classic drama series starring Jeremy Brett as Arthur Conan Doyle's legendary sleuth. Holmes's older brother Mycroft needs help solving the mystery of a young Greek forced by a gang to interpret for a man that they are holding prisoner.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Another case of the classic drama series starring Jeremy Brett as Arthur Conan Doyle's legendary sleuth. When Holmes investigates a suspicious death in a fire, the chief beneficiary of the victim's will becomes a murder suspect.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sean Bean stars in the drama series set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain and based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels. September 1813 - while in the Spanish hills, Sharpe and his men come across a scene of devastation in the town of Casa Antiga where the town has been sacked by a fearsome French commander and his Wolf brigade.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sean Bean stars in the drama series set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain and based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels. The Franco-Spanish frontier, 1813 - a carriage travelling through the Spanish countryside is ambushed by French soldiers and a young nun flees in terror... however, when the soldiers are themselves attacked by the English later on, a French colonel kills his captain.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. June 1813 - the South Essex is seriously short of men, and when the Duke of Wellington is told that there are no recruits available, he sends Sharpe to England to investigate. When Sharpe and Harper arrive, they are informed that there are 700 men waiting for them in Chelmsford - however, Sharpe finds the barracks deserted with no sign of his missing regiment. He and Harper decide to assume other identities and enlist - recruited by Sergeant Havercamp, Sharpe and Harper arrive at a training camp near the estate of Sir Henry Simmerson where they are trained mercilessly. Sharpe discovers that the new recruits are being auctioned to other regiments and returns to the Horse Guards with this information to entrust it to an old friend called Lawford... but Lawford wants to avoid a scandal and promptly tells Lord Fenner, who tries to have Sharpe killed. With the help of Fenner's mistress Lady Anne, Sharpe must now find the proof to implicate Fenner.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Winter 1813 - Wellington is informed by the debonair Comte de Maquerre that Bordeaux is ready to rebel against Napoleon, but Wellington's spymaster Ross is suspicious and tests Maquerre by suggesting that they use Maquerre's own castle as a base. Maquerre reluctantly agrees but says that the castle is in Napoleon's hands, so Wellington appoints Colonel Bampfylde to lead the attack on the castle with Sharpe in support. Bampfylde, who is intent on glory, sends Sharpe on a scouting mission and tries to capture the castle on his own, but he fails and casualties are heavy - Sharpe, who is a witness to the carnage, therefore has Harris and Frederickson sneak into the castle in disguise, and they soon force the French to surrender once inside. Ashamed by Sharpe's victory, Bampfylde sends him off on a reconnaissance mission - however, Sharpe soon discovers that Bordeaux has no intention of rising against Napoleon and that Maquerre is a double agent.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Lois Maxwell, who played Miss Moneypenny to Roger Moore's James Bond, and Doctor Who star William Troughton make guest appearances as freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case involving action and intrigue. The Saint visits Venice to save a damsel in distress, but he then finds himself plunged headlong into a seedy underworld of gangsters, intrigue, and deadly revenge.

programme.title: Everyone loves Raymond
programme.desc: From 2002. It's time for Ray to talk to Ally about the flower and the bees, but it turns out she's more interested in the meaning of life. How is Ray going to explain that?

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: From 2018. A malnourished and confused nine-year-old girl is found in a storage room, and NCIS suspects that she may be the daughter of a person who disappeared ten years earlier.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Extreme collectors
programme.desc: From 2021. Carmen lost her husband Mike. After a neck injury, she lost her job as a data management specialist. Being alone at home and without a job created anxiety that triggered Carmen's hoarding disorder.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. Politician Per Sandberg and his new flame, Bahareh Letnes, land on Granca to enjoy life in Puerto Rico. Bjørge aka Løkmannen and his wife Tove are making a comeback in Gran Canaria.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. Svein has traveled down alone and the complications are underway when he has to buy a present for his friend Linni Meister, who will be on holiday with him. Per and Bahareh take a trip on a jet ski.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. The ladies from the Big Family are in place and the gang is ready for cigars and red drinks. We visit Tom and the dog Lucas, who take life in stride, and Tove and Bjørge take an arduous walk with a walker on the beach

programme.desc: From 2024. Housing expert Karianne Amlie and her team of experts are authorized to buy and renovate a house for Kai and Frida. Halfway through the renovation, the experts discover a water leak in the ceiling.

programme.title: Buying a home blindly
programme.desc: From 2024. Sverre and Ann Marie live in a lovely house in Sande, but now want to move more centrally to Drammen. They want to live in the city centre, and housing expert Karianne Amlie is faced with an almost impossible job.

programme.title: The Legend Of Tarzan
programme.desc: From 2016. It has been several years since the man we once knew as Tarzan left the jungle life in Africa. He now lives an urban life as John Clayton III, Lord Greystoke, with his beloved wife, Jane.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2024. Roger is going shopping, in preparation for a blind date. It's Ony's birthday, so Roar, Per and Svein work together to give her a good celebration. The boyfriend and girlfriend Trond and Inger visit the island's cowboy village.

programme.title: Archipelago fever
programme.desc: From 2026. Snefrid and Erik make the most of their last day on Tjøme with swimming, fishing and grounding, before they take the boat up on the trailer. Toni and Yousef embark on a new boat trip in the inner Oslofjord and argue and enjoy themselves.

programme.desc: From 1987. Frances spends the summer of 1963 at the Kellermann's Mountain House resort. The place's snobbiest guests can take part in many activities, one of which is Johnny Castle's dance class.

programme.title: 28 days
programme.desc: From 2000. A female journalist leaves a wedding party by car, and is involved in a serious car accident. Suspicion of a blood alcohol level is present, and the journalist is sent to rehabilitation for 28 days.

programme.title: Swedish crime stories
programme.desc: From 2020. On 14 November 2019, seventeen-year-old Wilma disappears, and the whole of Uddevalla becomes involved in the disappearance. After a few days, blood is found in her and her boyfriend's apartment, but Wilma is still missing.

programme.title: Swedish crime stories
programme.desc: From 2020. On a rainy morning on October 19, 2004, an unknown man kills an eight-year-old boy and a 56-year-old woman in Linköping. The perpetrator disappears without a trace and the police must now find out who he is.

programme.title: Swedish crime stories
programme.desc: From 2020. The police have not given up on solving the double murder in Linköping. Following a change in Swedish law in 2019, the police now have the option of using commercial genealogy databases to find the perpetrator.

programme.desc: From 2016. A deadly thief enlists the help of the god Horus to free the people of Egypt from the chains of the god of darkness, Set.

programme.desc: From 2014. Dr. Will Caster is the leading researcher in artificial intelligence, but his controversial experiments have earned him many enemies.

programme.desc: From 2004. The small town of Odessa in Texas is segregated and in economic crisis, but one night a week gives the residents something to look forward to: Friday.

programme.desc: From 2013. The adopted son is getting married soon, so the divorced parents play happily married so as not to offend his Catholic biological mother.

programme.title: I Give it a Year

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: Sebuah pesawat penumpang yang mengalami kecelakaan terdampar di sebuah planet yang bermandikan sinar matahari. Namun nyawa para korban selamat mulai terancam ketika monster-monster karnivora muncul saat gerhana.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Seorang taipan korup membunuh saksi kejahatan. Hanya pacar seorang pengusaha yang memiliki hubungan dengan pemerintah Tiongkok yang melihat kejadian tersebut. Pengawal dari Beijing membantu polisi Hong Kong melindunginya. Namun, ia dan saksi tersebut mulai memiliki perasaan, yang memperumit keadaan.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 1
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 1
programme.desc: Tsunami menghancurkan Waikiki dan memicu bencana berantai. Gunung berapi meletus, air mendidih muncul dari bumi, Hoover Dam runtuh, hingga Mount Rushmore meledak oleh lava.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 2
programme.desc: Hotel-hotel di Las Vegas telah ambruk ke dalam tanah, Dr. Hill dan para penyintas yang tersisa berpacu untuk melarikan diri. Sementara itu, gempa bumi dahsyat mengancam akan membelah Amerika Utara menjadi dua dan pembangkit listrik tenaga nuklir berada tepat di jalurnya.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben's gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang peternak kecil setuju untuk menahan seorang penjahat yang tertangkap, yang sedang menunggu kereta untuk pergi ke pengadilan di Yuma. Pertarungan sengit pun terjadi saat penjahat itu mencoba mengelabui peternak tersebut.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.desc: Dalam perburuan harta karun emas yang melegenda, sekelompok prajurit, pembunuh, dan seorang prajurit Inggris yang jahat mendatangi sebuah desa di Tiongkok feodal, tempat seorang pandai besi yang rendah hati berupaya membela dirinya dan penduduk desa lainnya.

programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: Get Out

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 1
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen berada di Distrik 13 setelah ia menghancurkan dunia game selamanya. Di bawah kepemimpinan Presiden Coin dan nasihat dari teman-teman kepercayaannya, Katniss mengembangkan sayapnya saat ia berjuang menyelamatkan Peeta dan bangsa yang tergerak oleh keberaniannya.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Waterworld (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Mariner, seorang pengembara misterius di Bumi pasca-apokaliptik, bertemu dengan seorang wanita dan putrinya, lalu menawarkan bantuan untuk membawa mereka ke tempat aman. Bersama-sama mereka memulai sebuah petualangan yang dapat menyelamatkan umat manusia.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: Cape Fear (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang terpidana pemerkosaan, yang dibebaskan dari penjara setelah menjalani hukuman empat belas tahun, menguntit keluarga pengacara yang awalnya membelanya.

programme.desc: Sebuah serangan teroris membuat Arjun mengalami kelumpuhan dan sang kekasih meninggal dunia. Saat para teroris kembali, Arjun pun berpartisipasi dalam sebuah eksperimen untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many racers at heart race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the Green Hell is a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1, the legendary vehicles of the Procar series, are all back at the start in Salzburg for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: One of the top topics in this episode of Perfect Ride: topless models. With them, every adventure starts with a thrill: Spyder, Speedster, Roadster – in short: convertibles. Free driving and feeling of life in all variations (channel information).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Audi quattro, also called Urquattro, is a sports coupe from the Audi brand that was manufactured for a good ten years starting in 1980. The Urquattro is part of the success story of Audi's quattro drive in sports and road vehicles. Reporter Maximilian Engert presents the vehicle. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Only the best for Christmas. The topics today at Tuning: Our editorial team always goes full throttle. Best of eroticism. Peaceful Christmas time? Not at the X-mas Race in Eisenach. Things get busy here even in winter. Abt and MTM put the Audi R8 on the gift table. Which is the better package? And: Listen up! The best sounds with goosebumps guaranteed. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The “Stunt Heroes” from action concept film a car rollover. But that's not enough for stunt coordinator Carl. His motto: if already, then already! That's why he throws in a juicy shootout at the same time. He also has a surprise in store for his workshop boss: Uwe should sit in the passenger seat when the vehicle rolls over - for the very first time! New spectacular report about the creation of a car stunt! (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: “BMW Motorrad Vision Next 100” is the name of the motorcycle of the future. A helmet is no longer necessary, connectivity delivers all the information on a pair of driver glasses. In addition to the world premiere of the Future Bike in Santa Monica, our Los Angeles special takes us into the present with the new BMW G 310 R and into the past on the L.A. road trip: Designer Ola Stenegard draws inspiration from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: “Setra” – this name applies worldwide to buses of the highest quality. One of the largest and most modern bus factories in the world is located here in Neu-Ulm. EvoBus GmbH – a wholly owned subsidiary of Daimler AG – produces transport vehicles on over 700,000 square meters. Well over 3,000 Setra and Mercedes buses leave the production halls every year. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: The development of electromobility continues to progress. At the beginning the technology was still expensive, but now more and more vehicles are appearing for the general public. Volkswagen offers the ID.3. Hyundai has different electric drives for the Kona and Nissan has an absolute bestseller in its range with the Leaf. We test what these cars can do in everyday life. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most exciting cars in the world and arouse more desire than any other vehicle, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls Royce. With their extraordinary design and powerful engines, coupes arouse more emotions than any other car; they are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction. Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking dream coupes in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: He has a famous name and should heat up the Ferraris on the racetrack. The Bizzarrini GT 5300 from 1965. Giotto Bizzarrini, the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, wanted to use this car to return the favor to his former employer Enzo Ferrari, because the employment relationship ended in a dispute. But the Italian super sports car with the American V8 heart failed spectacularly. Today, however, the Bizzarrini 5300 GT is a sought-after collector's item and is often more expensive than a Ferrari. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The Macan is one of the most successful Porsche models. We are dedicating ourselves to the new edition of the Macan Turbo. Also: the Hyundai i20 in the test and another round at the Toyota winter driving school in Saalfelden, this time in the RAV4 and the classic Land Cruiser BJ 42. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The epitome of automotive industrialization. Only a few manufacturers are equally active in the USA and Europe so early. And with success – despite the different demands and needs of both markets. While the Mustang inspires American youth with automobiles, the Capri turns the heads of Europeans. Two continents, one unique story. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name “Green Hell”. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” – a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Dubai – the largest and most important Motor Sow in the Middle East takes place here. The sheikhs have a penchant for fast and exclusive vehicles, so everything that has a reputation in the car world is gathered here. And: Supercars go straight from the stand in Dubai. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Machine versus nature. A bit of madness is part of it when off-road enthusiasts drive breakneck maneuvers in the toughest off-road trophies with 800 HP monsters. They bite the hard stone. These include the most robust vehicles. We look off the roads and find some top off-roaders. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Half a century of Ferrari. Rearview Mirror gets to the bottom of the Ferrari myth and takes a closer look at the red racers from Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: People's sport and people's fun. The topics in tuning today: Bavarian whirlwind: Tuner Hartge builds a lot of engine in very little BMW. The impressive result: The Hartge Compact 3.3 with 343 hp. Italian charmer: The Alfa 156 GTA shines with a wonderful V6, 250 hp and a sound to kneel down on. Does it also impress on the Nordschleife? Nocturnal twisting worm: The Night Drift Challenge in Oschersleben. Wolfsburg noble plane: The Golf R32 is not only elegant but also really sporty. 241 hp plus all-wheel drive make it possible. And: Allgäu DTM flair at home: The Abt Audi TT Limited 2. From the race track to the road. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: At Action Concept it gets down to business: young stuntmen Daniel is supposed to do a forward somersault with his car. And beat up his colleague Lars. Adrenaline in its purest form – and all just for the camera. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​presenter Martin Utberg and his wife Emma organize an annual vintage car tour for a select group: the Classic Hebrst Tour. This year the route leads from Seefeld in Tyrol to the Dolomites and Lake Iseo. After 700 kilometers the tour goes back to Seefeld via the Timmelsjoch. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is the vision of an electric future from AMG: The Concept AMG GT XX delivers an incredible 1360 hp and charges faster than you can say range anxiety. We were there for the spectacular world premiere. And: This racer looks like it came out of a retro film but is the brand new top model from Morgan. We reveal five exciting facts about this British work of art. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, Eric van Lammeren tells the special story behind the recreation of the Bugatti Type 41 Royale prototype, which Ettore Bugatti used as a private vehicle for five years and which was considered lost for a long time after a crash. In the SML CarGroup showroom, Eric speaks to an audience with Thomas Hientz and presenter Martin Utberg about the background and fascination of this extraordinary project. Martin and Thomas are also traveling in a very special Mercedes-AMG PureSpeed. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: The Knight from Scotland – Sir Jackie Stewart
programme.desc: Sir Jackie Stewart is one of the most famous British racing drivers and is celebrated for more than just his three world championship wins. He has also made a name for himself through his work to improve the safety of racing drivers. The number of his Formula 1 victories pales in comparison to the number of people whose lives the Scottish driver has saved. (Station info).

programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The whole fascination of motorcycles: from super sports cars, naked bikes or tourers to cruisers, supermotos, freestyle motocross or racing machines. We drive anything that has two wheels. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The British county of Chesire, in the tranquil town of Crewe, has been home to one of the most exclusive automobile manufacturers for 70 years: Bentley Motors. 400 hours of pure manual work, meticulous accuracy, a lot of technical know-how and a lot of passion from the employees turn the top model, the Bentley Mulsanne, into a sculpture on wheels. At Bentley, not only luxury traditionally plays a role, but also performance. Bentley Boy Steven Kane chases the Bentley Mulsanne Speed, which goes over 300 km/h and costs around 325,000 euros, around the race track. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Compact, efficient and environmentally friendly. Electric minis are redefining urban lifestyles. With the Rocks-e, Opel wants to revolutionize city traffic and help young people get their first car. The e.GO Life has space for four people and a range that should be sufficient for everyday life. We tested it! Also: An overview of the latest small electric cars. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Italy is the country of fashion, design and the most exciting cars in the world. In no other country are there as many well-known manufacturers of sports cars as in Italy. Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati and Alfa Romeo are considered the epitome of breathtaking cars around the world, designed with stunning shapes, capricious engines and unparalleled passion. Dream Cars presents the most exclusive and fastest sports cars from Ferrari, Maserati, Lamborghini and Alfa Romeo. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: He helped found the legend of the German Silver Arrows: the Mercedes W 125 Grand Prix car from 1937. Big names like Rudolf Caracciola and Manfred von Brauchitsch competed for victories in the single-seater with up to over 600 hp. At the Großglockner Grand Prix, former Formula 1 driver Jochen Mass drives the Silver Arrow up the 92 curves to the Großglockner. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In addition to the classic Sportback variant, Audi also offers the A3 as a sedan. We subjected this model to extensive practical testing. Also: the Lexus RX, the revised version of the premium SUV from Toyota's luxury brand on the test site in Ibiza. And: Volkswagen is also launching a new model variant of the e-Up! after. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: Mercedes racing: the beginning of an era
programme.desc: Power, passion, pole position – Mercedes has been writing motorsport history for 120 years. The list of successes of the brand with the star is long. As early as 1894, a Daimler and a Benz took part in the first car race. The victories at the French Grand Prix in 1908 and 1914 are outstanding. Car History shows how Mercedes dominated racing from the first automobile race onwards. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Bavaria Historic Rally Around 3,000 “Schnauferl” cavort in front of a picturesque. Polished to a high gloss, for some people it's more sporty, for others it's more comfortable and for others, above all, it's "skillful" on the slopes. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: When choosing a vehicle, price plays a role, as does equipment, drive, space and much more. There are certain characteristics that manufacturers use to assign their vehicle models to a vehicle class. However, there is no clear and generally valid definition of these classes and the boundaries are often blurred. S in the luxury class from Mercedes-Benz is not the same as S in the Audi S3. What does Q stand for on the Infinity Q50 for more quality? We present the vehicles and visit the Shanghai Auto Show, one of the most important automobile exhibitions in China. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Four powered wheels are better than two. This was once established. The Quattro drive is now almost 30 years old. Rearview mirror presents Audi and the Quattro drive. An innovative and very successful story. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg welcomes the former racing driver and car designer Erich Bitter in Seefeld in Tyrol. During a tour of the Seefeld Olympic region, the now 87-year-old Bitter talks about his life, his career and his passions. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world, a synonym for comfort and opulence and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: the Mercedes S-Class. But why is that so? What makes this vehicle so special and sets it apart from all others? We drive all model series, from the 450 SEL 6.9 to the current S 580 e, and explore the fascination of each model. (Station info).

programme.title: Rally 2024
programme.desc: Chantilly Arts & Elegance combines motorsport history with haute couture in an exclusive event. Historic racing cars, elegant bodies and stylish fashion presentations make this meeting unique. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.sub-title: Mackville, Wisconsin, Unlimited Super Stock Tractors
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Bavaria Historic Rally Around 3,000 “Schnauferl” cavort in front of a picturesque. Polished to a high gloss, for some people it's more sporty, for others it's more comfortable and for others, above all, it's "skillful" on the slopes. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: When choosing a vehicle, price plays a role, as does equipment, drive, space and much more. There are certain characteristics that manufacturers use to assign their vehicle models to a vehicle class. However, there is no clear and generally valid definition of these classes and the boundaries are often blurred. S in the luxury class from Mercedes-Benz is not the same as S in the Audi S3. What does Q stand for on the Infinity Q50 for more quality? We present the vehicles and visit the Shanghai Auto Show, one of the most important automobile exhibitions in China. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Four powered wheels are better than two. This was once established. The Quattro drive is now almost 30 years old. Rearview mirror presents Audi and the Quattro drive. An innovative and very successful story. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: New entry-level bikes from Triumph and BMW
programme.desc: With the brand new entry-level Street Twin model, the traditional British brand is trying to assert itself against increasing competition in nostalgic motorcycles. The model combines classic design with the latest technology.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Boizenburg - one hour south of Hamburg. Old car wrecks and strange conversions are piled up on an old factory site. This is the territory of Ingo Sillus, a hard rocker, Harley rider and USA fan.

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.desc: From the Phoenix Raceway in Avondale, Arizona, USA.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: One of the most spectacular German sports cars is handcrafted in Dülmen near Münster: the Wiesmann. It arose from an obsession of the car-crazy brothers Friedhelm and Martin Wiesmann, who managed to build their own sports car company with passion and persistence.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: This documentary presents the development of sustainability in the automotive industry. The latest research and environmentally friendly concepts at the car shows are presented and various aspects are taken into account.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: The most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain are on display. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and British flair.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the corner. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The VW 181, called "Kübel", was presented in 1969 as one of the most bizarre cars ever built: open, spacious, solid, cheap and four-door. Designed for the Bundeswehr, it initially found hardly any civilian buyers.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. It's also about the Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. Everyone is also testing the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Ford produced one classic after another in the 60s and 70s. The formula for this is: simple technology, attractive shape, affordable price. The cult cars include Taunus, Escort and Capri.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: The Enduro Park in Hechlingen is a former quarry that was transformed into one of the leading enduro training areas in Europe in the 1990s. Qualified instructors instruct motocross fans in driving skills.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Tucson is Hyundai's best-selling car. The N-Line equipment line could turn the Korean into an athlete. In 2018, the twelfth series of the best-selling car in the world comes: the Toyota Corolla. VW brings the T-Cross.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: various contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Mercedes Simplex is the ancestor of the Mercedes models. It was built between 1902 and 1906.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: In Dubai, the legendary Supercars police fleet hunts down speeders and illegal parkers. And at MTM and Alpina they get more power from the Audis and BMWs. The Audi S8 MTM Talladega R starts with a whopping 802 hp.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Stunt coordinator Domi and his team give their all when they perform spectacular stunts.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Lightweight construction has long been a concept in motorsport. This design has now also found its way into the production of road vehicles, such as the sports cars from Lotus, Caterham, Roding and Radical.

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: The Road Crime Unit, in conjunction with the TAG team, carries out a joint drug raid. Steve and his dog Razor are called to an attempted burglary, while Chris and Mike are on the trail of a speeder.

programme.title: Beyond Justice
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. Agent Tom Burton (Rutger Hauer) goes to Morocco with businesswoman Christine Sanders (Carol Alt) to rescue her son, the kidnapped heir to a desert fortune.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: Sandokan: Pirate of Malaysia
programme.desc: Filmed in Singapore it tells the story of Sandokan who is a Malaysian rebel who, with a group of renegades, goes up against a British General who is trying to force the King to resign.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death
programme.desc: After a stagecoach is robbed and the passengers murdered, a long and tangled series of surprise attacks a murderous double-crosses leaves the coach’s strongbox in the hands of the killer Lasky. It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: Alive Or Preferably Dead
programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S2 E22 — Classic motorsport at its bestThe world's largest racing event for historic vehicles is the Goodwood Revival in England. Over 150,000 fans flock to the country estate of the noble Earl of March. Visitors can expect many highlights such as the race for the Shelby Cup.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E16 — Episode 16The Porsche Taycan has entered the Guinness Book of Records with a world record.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S2 — Mercedes - The Silver ArrowsThe Silver Arrows represent an unprecedented era of motorsport. They dominated the racing scene in the 1930s. Rudolf Caracciola, Hermann Lang, Juan Manuel Fangio and Stirling Moss are the heroes of that time.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: S1 E6 — Tourists in the Green Hell 6 Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Bike and Music WeekendThe Bike and Music Weekend is one of the events for motorcycle fans. Every summer, thousands of bikers and motorcycle fans from all over the world gather in Geiselwind, Germany to show off their vehicles and have fun.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E16 — SUV - In the fast laneThe show focuses on the boom in SUVs from mini off-road vehicles to luxury vehicles.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Porsche killer and Wankel-BenzThe BMW 2002 Turbo was an absolute blast in its time. A real racer and Porsche killer. The Mercedes C111 was developed as a concept study. With a Wankel engine, sophisticated aerodynamics and a number of technical innovations.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S1 E24 — Visiting a trade fair with PromibonusTuning is a way of life for many car fans: the search for ever more horsepower, better sound and extraordinary design. The show takes a look behind the scenes of well-known, renowned and private tuning companies.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S1 E11 — Mass pile-upFog, darkness, a rear-end collision with many cars. This happens again and again on German motorways. The “Stunt Heroes” recreate such a scene. It is the starting point for a stunt with burning people and a firefighter.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S4 E49 — Oldtimer Gallery ToffenThe program reports on a visit to the Oldtimer Gallery in Toffen, Switzerland.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 E230 — Porsche 911 Speed ​​DatingAll 27 variants of the Porsche 911 are shown and their features are presented in detail. During a test and road trip through the Black Forest and the Palatinate, the presenter finally chooses his favorite 911 model.

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: S7 E14 — Aggressive TeensColin and his German Shepherd Raven are called to a teen disturbance, Simon and the TAG team conduct a drug raid, and Roger and Giles do a vehicle check.

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026

programme.desc: S1 E3 — Episode 3Cars that no longer run are their business. It doesn't matter whether it's an accident or a parking violation: cars that are no longer running must be disposed of. A case for the breakdown service that cleans up on the road.

programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph.

programme.title: Dream Cars

programme.title: Crash

programme.title: Cars + Life

programme.title: Bike Film: Shires - Biking in Great Britain
programme.desc: Shires is a cycling film shot over two years and narrated by Rob Warner.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E4 — Too many distractionsEverything is decided in the head: On the way to fourth place, the talents have to stay focused while the pressure off the pitch increases.

programme.title: SURF: Against Gravity
programme.desc: Born in the water, shaped by the ocean: Olympian and surfing professional Leon Glatzer talks about freedom, setbacks and his journey to the best surfing spots in the world.

programme.title: SURF: Now Days – Women shape the sport
programme.desc: Surfing is experiencing a historic turning point. When exceptional talents train together, the boundaries between friendship and competition become blurred. We dedicate ourselves to the challenges they encounter and that shape their team spirit.

programme.title: MUSIC: Red Bull Trapped - S1 E1
programme.desc: Hip-hop under high pressure: A rapper and a creator face rap-related puzzles, games and creative challenges in the escape room.

programme.title: The Streets Don't Lie
programme.desc: Berlin - SalzburgThree players with a tough past come to train at the Red Bull Academy in Salzburg. Previously they struggled to assert themselves due to poor health, lack of self-confidence or lack of support.

programme.title: Battlefield America
programme.desc: Vicksburg: Episode 2 highlights the strategic decisions of Ulysses S. Grant and Robert E. (Part 2 of 3) (S)

programme.title: Plunderer: the Life and Times...
programme.desc: ...of a Nazi Art Thief: Dealing in looted art, Bruno Lohse became an invisible hand, even as the original owners' families sought the return of works rightfully theirs. (Part 2 of 2) (S)

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Isles
programme.desc: Continuing his island-hopping odyssey Paul sets sail on an island pilgrimage in the footsteps of saints, visiting Lismore, Colonsay and Oronsay. (Part 4 of 6) (S)
